description_long: This object is a stylized potted plant featuring a tall, segmented brown trunk with three distinct, stacked pot-like sections. At the top, a dense cluster of large, broad, dark green leaves fans outward, resembling the foliage of a palm or tropical plant. The trunk sections are geometric and angular, giving the pot a tiered, modern appearance. The leaves are flat and sharply cut, with visible creases and a slightly irregular outline, adding to the stylized look. The pot sections appear to be made of a material similar to terracotta or painted ceramic, with a matte finish. There are no visible decorations or labels on the pot, and the plant is likely intended for placement on the floor in an urban or park setting.
description: A stylized potted plant with a tall, segmented brown trunk and a dense cluster of large, dark green leaves at the top. The pot is tiered and angular, with a modern, plain finish.
description_view_0: The plant is seen from an angle, showing the stacked, angular brown pot sections and the broad, fanned green leaves.
description_view_1: A direct front view highlights the symmetrical arrangement of the leaves and the central alignment of the trunk and pot.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the depth of the leaf cluster and the geometric stacking of the pot sections.
description_view_3: The back view reveals the overlapping leaves and the consistent, plain design of the pot's rear.
